_comment: Copy this file to eol_config.json and edit to match your stack.
Product names must match the endoflife.date API.
Browse https://endoflife.date/ to find valid product names,
Version must match a release cycle (not the full patch version).
To see available cycles:  curl https://endoflife.date/api/{product}.json
notify_when: 'always'      = daily report regardless of alerts
'alerts_only' = only when something is EOL or approaching
notifications: list of output channels. Supported types:
console   - print plain-text report to stdout
html_file - write HTML report to 'path' (default: eol_report.html)
sns       - publish plain-text to SNS topic (topic_arn or SNS_TOPIC_ARN env var)
ses       - send HTML email via SES (from_email, to_emails, or env vars)
